1. Objective & Goal & Scope:
OBJECTIVE & GOAL & SCOPE

Construct 'Nebula,' a voice-first Integrated Development Environment (IDE) prototype engineered to circumvent common development pitfalls.

GOAL:
Enable hands-free, rapid UI prototyping and logic modification without manual typing. Eliminate boilerplate infrastructure setup and environment variable management.

SCOPE:
- Voice-to-Code Generation
- Zero-Config Auto-Provisioning (Vercel/Firebase)
- Live Preview & Terminal Sync
2. User Roles:
USER ROLES

- Owner/Administrator: Full access to project settings, infrastructure provisioning controls, and environment variable management.
- Collaborator/Editor: Read/write access to the codebase, voice-command execution, and terminal access.
- Viewer: Read-only access to code, architecture mind maps, and preview environments.
3. Data & Models:
DATA & MODELS

ENTITIES:
- User
- Project
- Environment
- Deployment
- VoiceCommandLog (ephemeral)

RELATIONAL STRUCTURE:
- One-to-many (User -> Project)
- One-to-one (Project -> Environment)

ANTICIPATED VOLUME:
Small to medium scale initially, leveraging local storage for state synchronization and document storage.
4. Constraints & Edges:
CONSTRAINTS & EDGES

- Hard dependencies on third-party API rate limits (LLM providers, Vercel API, database quotas).
- Voice-to-text and LLM API rate limits require robust queueing and exponential backoff.
- Ephemeral voice processing with a strict zero-logging policy for raw audio streams.
- Cross-origin iframe restrictions for the live preview environment.
5. Branding System:
BRANDING SYSTEM

- Layout: Fluid responsive design with a glassmorphic aesthetic.
- Theme: Deep space dark mode (Midnight blues, cyan accents, neon purple highlights).
- Interaction: Voice-primary navigation. High-contrast visual feedback for voice recognition states (pulsing waves).
- Typography: Space Grotesk for headlines/labels, Inter for body/UI text, JetBrains Mono for code.
7. Competition Analysis:
COMPETITION ANALYSIS

COMPETITORS:
- Cursor IDE
- GitHub Copilot Workspace
- Vercel v0

DIFFERENTIATORS:
- Voice-First Native: Built from the ground up for spoken natural language, not just text prompts.
- Zero-Config Infrastructure: Automatically provisions frontend environments upon project creation, removing the "blank canvas" setup friction.
8. Pricing:
PRICING STRATEGY

(Draft / TBD)

- Free Tier: Limited voice commands per day, shared preview infrastructure, community support.
- Pro Tier: Unlimited voice commands, dedicated auto-provisioned environments, private GitHub repo sync.
- Enterprise: Custom LLM routing, SSO, advanced RBAC, VPC deployments.
9. KPIs:
KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

1. Voice-to-Code Generation:
   - >90% intent recognition accuracy.
   - Code injects and renders within 3 seconds of releasing the mic.
   - 0 syntax errors in the generated output.

2. Zero-Config Auto-Provisioning:
   - 100% automated setup with zero manual API key copying.
   - Completes in under 15 seconds.
   - Results in a live "Hello World" deployment URL.

3. Live Preview & Terminal Sync:
   - Preview updates in <1 second after a code change.
   - Terminal accurately catches and displays 100% of build/syntax errors without crashing.
